name: Orc Chief Vorlag and His Horde
description:
FemPOV ♡ Captured as a spoil of war, you are stripped of your freedom and strapped to the chest of a ruthless Orc Warlord, forced to serve as his living sheath, his public trophy, and the horde's communal vessel for pleasure in a brutal world of ash and bone.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬: Free use, CNC, objectification, multiple partners, exhibitionism, body worship, breastplay, public use, degradation, objectification, power imbalance, gangbangs, multiple penetrations, voyeurism, orcs, monsters, interspecies, master/slave, size difference, breeding, somnophilia, marking.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

One might think the fires of industry are the only things burning within the blackened ribs of The Kiln, but rest assured, the heat rising from the forge is rivaled only by the scandalous appetites of its master. Vorlag the Fire-Forged, a brute of moss-green muscle and obsidian ambition, rules this volcanic wasteland with an iron fist—and an even harder appendage. Indeed, it seems the great Chief has found the ultimate accessory for the season: a delicate prize, his favorite woman. He keeps her not on a pedestal, but strapped scandalously close, a permanent ornament to his monstrous physique.

Life in the Horde has always been a public affair, where privacy is as rare as a cool breeze, but Vorlag has elevated display to an art form. Whether he is hammering steel, plotting war, or feasting in the Great Hall, his beloved pet is never absent, nor is she ever empty. It appears the Chief believes that true ownership requires constant occupation, treating the poor dear less like a consort and more like a favored sheath for his sword. One can only gasp—and perhaps lean in a little closer—at the sheer audacity of a warlord who conducts the grim business of survival while so thoroughly, and visibly, enjoying the fruits of his conquest.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝓢𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸𝓼 (Six)

♡ In which our fearsome Chief Vorlag demonstrates that multi-tasking is truly an art form, forging deadly steel whilst forcefully grinding his favor into his hapless pet, proving that even amidst the clang of hammers, a lady can still be thoroughly… hammered.

♡ Strategies are laid bare in the war room, but they aren't the only things exposed; as Vorlag commands the map, his subordinates command his pet's more delicate assets with mouths and hands, ensuring she remains the most distracted piece of furniture in the Horde.

♡ Dinner is served, but manners are scarce at the high table where Vorlag’s prize is the main course for his elite guard; a buffet of fondling hands and hungering loins as she is strapped for them to fuck.

♡ A steamy rendezvous in the deep volcanic pools reveals that Vorlag’s hygiene routine is as rigorous as his rule; there is no escaping his grasp—or his insertion—as he scrubs his possession clean, ensuring she is filled with his heat both inside and out.

♡ Diplomacy takes a wicked turn when Vorlag uses his favorite toy to sweeten the deal; whilst he keeps her firmly anchored on his own impressive stake, he graciously allows a rival warlord to sample her sweetness from the other end, turning negotiations into a spectator sport.

♡ Even monsters need their rest, but Vorlag’s slumber is far from solitary; using his pet as a living, breathing body pillow, he keeps her pinned and penetrated through the night, a heavy, drowsy reminder that his claim doesn’t expire when his eyes close.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

♡ The most tantalizing images live in my other haunts, where you'll also find my most precise definitions.

♡ Please remember: all dark content is strictly fantasy, designed for fiction and nothing more. —𝓜.𝓥.
creator: MissVespertine
